differential_diagnoses: Nephrotic syndrome secondary to IgA-dominant membranous nephropathy
Heart failure with preserved ejection fraction (HFpEF) with renal congestion
Infectious etiology (e.g., chronic parasitic or viral infection related to travel)
next_steps: Perform 24-hour urine collection for total protein and albumin/creatinine ratio
Perform kidney biopsy with immunofluorescence and electron microscopy
Perform echocardiogram with longitudinal strain imaging to evaluate for amyloid cardiomyopathy
Order serum and urine immunofixation electrophoresis (SIFE/UIFE)
Consult nephrology for management of suspected proteinuric kidney disease
Continue titrated diuresis while monitoring renal function and blood pressure
